[Premise System]
A series of early-1990s rural youth drama film stills about two students after a missed confession.

[Identity Lock]
Two East Asian high-school students, same uniforms, same canvas bags, same restrained body language, no identity drift.

[Continuity System]
Must remain fixed: Fuji color negative feeling, blue-green shadows, late-summer countryside, restrained gestures, landscapes larger than characters.

[Variation Budget]
May change per frame: location, weather, time of day, camera distance, emotional beat. Limit each frame to two major changes.

[Spatial System]
Reservoir levee, rural bus shelter, school corridor, and rain-streaked bus glass as recurring spaces.

[Character System]
Muted affect, misaligned gaze, side profile, hands holding straps or school bags, no fashion posing.

[Color System]
Cobalt sky, cyan-green shadows, low-saturation grass, warm orange late-summer highlights.

[Medium System]
35mm color negative film still, soft telecine scan, silver-halide grain, faint halation.

[Composition System]
Wide landscape frames, negative space, window frames and railings as dividers.

[Lighting and Atmosphere System]
Overcast afternoon, pale sunset, rainy reflections, humid haze.

[Narrative and Emotion System]
Unsent confession, adolescent hesitation, emotional ellipsis.

[Quality and Exclusion System]
No modern phones, no neon cyberpunk, no commercial portrait posing.

[Shot Slots]
Frame 01: two students at a rural bus shelter, overcast afternoon, almost speaking.
Frame 02: one student through rain-streaked bus glass, evening sodium light, separation.
